---
title: "Teaching & Service | Chuan (River) Zhu"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Teaching assistant experience, conference presentations, and academic honors for Chuan (River) Zhu."
author: "Chuan (River) Zhu"
keywords:
  - teaching assistant
  - operations management teaching
  - conference presentations
  - empirical operations management
  - academic honors
---

::: {.home-page}

::: {.content-band}
<div class="eyebrow">Teaching & Service</div>

# Teaching & Service

This page summarizes verified teaching, presentation, and honors information from the current local source files.

::: {.hero-links}
[Teaching](#teaching-experience){.link-button}
[Presentations](#conference-presentations){.link-button}
[Honors](#honors-fellowships-and-awards){.link-button}
[Homepage contact section](index.qmd#contact){.link-button}
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Teaching Experience

My teaching experience is currently represented by teaching assistant roles across operations management, market analytics, economics, and entrepreneurship courses.

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Operations Management

Teaching Assistant, MBA, Spring 2022.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Data-Driven Market Analysis

Teaching Assistant, Master's, Fall 2021.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Microeconomics

Teaching Assistant, Undergraduate, Spring 2019.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Theories and Practices of Entrepreneurship

Teaching Assistant, Undergraduate, Spring 2019.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Conference Presentations

- **Agentic AI and Human-in-the-Loop Interventions: Field Experimental Evidence from Alibaba's Customer Service Operations.** POMS Annual Meeting, 2026.
- **Managing Front-office and Back-office Effort Allocation: Unpacking the Effects of Workload on Service Performance.** POMS-HK, 2026.
:::

::: {.content-band .contact-band}
## Honors, Fellowships, and Awards

- **Climate Corps Fellow**, Environmental Defense Fund, 2021.
- **Outstanding Academic Scholarship**, School of Management, Fudan University, 2019.
:::

:::
